error_signature: This operation is not supported for this document
title: Google Slides replace operation fails with unsupported document error
symptom: When attempting to use the replace text operation in the Google Slides node, an error message indicates that the operation is not supported for the document.
applies_when: Attempting to replace text in a specific document
not_this_if: The document is compatible with the replace operation
root_cause: The error occurs because the Google Slides node requires a valid document structure that supports the replace operation. If the document is not properly initialized or lacks the necessary elements, the operation will fail.
fix_steps: Create a new Google Slides document
Add a 'Get Slides' node before the 'Replace Text' node
Reconfigure the workflow to use the new document
agent_instruction: Create a new Google Slides document and add a 'Get Slides' node before the 'Replace Text' node.
